mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_config WHERE config_group = #{configGroup} AND config_key = #{configKey}
SELECT * FROM sys_config ORDER BY config_group, config_key
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_config (config_group, config_key, config_value, config_desc, is_encrypted, created_by) VALUES (#{configGroup}, #{configKey}, #{configValue}, #{configDesc}, #{isEncrypted}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_config SET config_value = #{configValue}, config_desc = #{configDesc}, is_encrypted = #{isEncrypted}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE config_group = #{configGroup} AND config_key = #{configKey}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_config WHERE config_group = #{configGroup} AND config_key = #{configKey}
